summary: pre-1 check failed: task 162 OptionSome/OptionNone variants absent from codebase. Escalated as esc-163-25. No implementation steps taken.

Added OptionSome/OptionNone variants to CompiledExprKind in reify-types, plus walk/collect/remap arms and constructors. Added stub eval_expr arms and option_eval_tests.rs with step-1 tests. Blocked: reify-compiler/src/lib.rs:collect_body_refs_inner() also matches on CompiledExprKind exhaustively and needs OptionSome/OptionNone arms — outside task scope. Escalated.

All 6 steps complete. Fixed reify-compiler collect_body_refs_inner exhaustive match (OptionSome/OptionNone arms). Implemented OptionNone => Value::Option(None) and OptionSome(inner) => Value::Option(Some(Box::new(eval(inner)))) in eval_expr. 12 tests in option_eval_tests.rs all pass. Full reify-expr suite clean.

Verify current workspace compiles and tests pass on the worktree baseline (cargo check --workspace); Write failing tests for Type::Orientation in ty.rs: variant construction with Orientation(3), Display format 'Orientation3', factory method Type::orientation(n), Eq/Hash consistency, is_numeric() returns false, as_name() returns None; Add Orientation(usize) variant to Type enum, add orientation(n) factory method, add Display arm writing 'Orientation{n}'. Derives (Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash) are automatic.; Write failing tests for Value::Orientation in value.rs: variant construction, PartialEq (same quaternion equal, different not equal, NaN bitwise equality via to_bits), Ord (type_tag ordering, within-type lexicographic on w/x/y/z bits), Display format '[w, x, y, z]q', content_hash (tag=16, NaN canonicalization, distinct from other variants); Add Orientation { w: f64, x: f64, y: f64, z: f64 } variant to Value enum. Add arms to: content_hash (tag=16 with NaN canonicalization for all 4 components), PartialEq (bitwise f64 comparison), Ord (type_tag=15, compare w/x/y/z via to_bits), Display (format as quaternion). Add is_undef/as_f64/dimension pass-through (Orientation is not numeric, dimension is DIMENSIONLESS).; Fix downstream exhaustive matches: add Value::Orientation arm to format_value() in reify-lsp/src/analysis.rs (format as quaternion string), add Value::Orientation arm to domain classifier in reify-constraints/src/classifier.rs (Orientation doesn't contribute to domain classification, same as Complex/Tensor). Add Type::Orientation and Value::Orientation to exports.rs verification test.; Write failing test for orient_identity: no-arg call returns Value::Orientation { w: 1.0, x: 0.0, y: 0.0, z: 0.0 }; call with args returns Undef; Add orient_identity match arm in eval_builtin: check args.is_empty(), return identity quaternion (1,0,0,0)

Completed all remaining 8 steps. orient_quaternion: normalize_quaternion helper + 4-arg extraction. orient_axis_angle: tensor_components_f64 for axis + trig_input for angle + axis-angle formula. orient_euler: elementary_rotation_quat + quat_mul helpers, 12 conventions (6 Tait-Bryan + 6 proper Euler). orient_basis: orthonormality validation + Shepperd's method for rotation-matrix-to-quaternion. 159 stdlib tests pass, workspace compiles clean.

All 19 steps complete. Wrote 34 failing tests covering: complex() constructor (Real/Int/mixed, Scalar with dimensions, error cases: dimension mismatch, NaN/Inf, wrong arg count, non-numeric), re/im accessors (dimensionless→Real, dimensioned→Scalar, non-complex→Undef), conjugate, magnitude extended for Complex, phase (atan2 returning ANGLE Scalar), complex_add with dimension matching, complex_mul with DimensionVector::mul() for dimension combination, and Complex<Impedance> integration test. Implemented all 7 new eval_builtin arms (complex, re, im, conjugate, phase, complex_add, complex_mul) plus extended magnitude. 199 stdlib tests pass, workspace clean.

All 15 steps complete. Fixed compilation error: is_geometry_let was updated to take functions param for shadow checking but 5 call sites still passed 1 arg — fixed in compile_entity (3 sites), register_guarded_names (added param + 2 recursive calls + 2 external callers), compile_block_guard (1 site). All implementation was already present: TransformKind::Scale/RotateAround (pre-1), GeometryOp::Scale/RotateAround (pre-2), scale_shape/rotate_around_shape C++ FFI (pre-3/4), is_geometry_function + compile_geometry_call arms (step-1/2/3/4), kernel dispatch + tests (step-5/6/7/8), eval dispatch + tests (step-9/10/11). 35 compiler tests, 147 eval tests pass, workspace compiles clean.
